creator: petteri.valkonen@iki.fi
text:
Created attachment 218240
Patch to update bandwhich to version 0.18.1

Update net-mgmt/bandwhich to version 0.18.1.

Changelog: https://github.com/imsnif/bandwhich/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md#0181---2020-09-11

The patch includes a hotfix from https://github.com/imsnif/bandwhich/commit/32300aff5371d5d074470998ac64f942fb4b9c86 to fix the build on FreeBSD.
